quoteDescription: New Wraparound Labels - 109x292mm - rentons premium finish
lineDescription: New Wraparound Labels - 109x292mm - Std Matte Laminate||Size: 109mm x 292mm||Material: PP Metallic Silver||Print Colour: White + CMYK||Tool: D0289(6,2)(0,1)0.6mm Rectangle||Provided on 76mm Cores||Finishing: Rentons Premium||MACHINE APPLIED||Supply: Rolls||Qty: 1,250 / 2,500 / 5,000||5 x 250 each / 5 x 500 each / 5 x 1,000 each||
deliveryToAddress: New Dimension Distilling Co ||4 Songbird Place ||Burleigh Waters QLD 4220
